sections.2_services: Vendor will provide cloud-based AI services. Vendor may process personal data as needed to provide the Services.
sections.3_fees_payment: Net 7 payment terms. Late payment penalty 5% per month compounded.
sections.4_indemnity: Customer shall indemnify Vendor for any and all losses, including consequential, special, and punitive damages, without limitation.
sections.5_liability_cap: Vendor's liability is limited to $10,000 in aggregate, no exceptions. Customer's liability is unlimited.
sections.6_ip: Contractor irrevocably assigns to Customer all intellectual property, including any pre-existing IP used in connection with the Services.
sections.7_confidentiality: Receiving party shall hold all Confidential Information in strict confidence. No exceptions for residual knowledge.
sections.8_data_protection: Vendor may process personal data as needed to provide the Services. No DPA attached.
sections.9_audit_rights: Vendor's compliance is solely as represented by Vendor; no audit rights.
sections.11_termination: Customer may terminate this Agreement at any time, for any or no reason, upon five (5) days' notice. Customer shall have no liability for any wind-down costs.
sections.12_assignment: Vendor may freely assign this Agreement to any third party without notice. Customer may not assign without Vendor's consent.
sections.13_force_majeure: Force majeure covers only acts of God and war. Pandemic and supply-chain disruption are NOT covered.
sections.14_governing_law: This Agreement is governed by California law. Disputes resolved in San Francisco state court.
